package rulecoverage

func NegativeGrpcLargeMessageWithoutStreaming() string {
    ruleID := "grpc_large_message_without_streaming"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "unary RPC handlers returning or receiving messages > 4MB (inferred from large slice/struct serialization patterns)"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
